# host-budget

Asserts the host-admission convergence property: the summed CPU cost of every
declared host pool (`host-admission/core`'s `RESERVED_POOLS` plus the derived CPU
pool residual `B`) fits under `hostCpuCeiling()`, and `B` stays `≥ 1`. Reads the
cost declarations from the single core data table — never by importing server
pool code.
